diagrams.title: Virtual Address to Physical Address Translation
diagrams.description: Shows how a virtual address is translated to physical address using a page table
diagrams.purpose: Understanding address translation mechanics and the role of page tables in memory management

diagrams.title: Hierarchical Two-Level Page Table Structure
diagrams.description: Illustrates a two-level page table organization with outer and inner tables
diagrams.purpose: Visualizing how hierarchical page tables reduce memory overhead through selective allocation

diagrams.title: Page Table Entry (PTE) Format
diagrams.description: Shows the bit-level structure of a typical page table entry
diagrams.purpose: Understanding what information is stored in each page table entry and its role in memory management

diagrams.title: TLB and Page Table Interaction
diagrams.description: Shows how TLB works with page table for faster address translation
diagrams.purpose: Understanding hardware caching of page table entries for improved performance
